landing.title: Welcome to AulaCheck
landing.heroDescription: Simplify your teaching life. Keep track of attendance, grades, and students in one place, accessible from any device.
landing.featureQRDesc: Your students register themselves by scanning a QR code, making data entry faster and easier.
landing.featureBioDesc: Access faster with FaceID or Fingerprint using Passkeys.
landing.featureExportDesc: Export attendance and grades to CSV in one click.
landing.step2Desc: Share a link or show the QR code on screen.
landing.step3Desc: Take attendance in seconds without using paper.
landing.ctaDesc: Join teachers who already optimize their time with AulaCheck.

login.description: Smart attendance and grade management for teachers.
login.errorGoogle: Error logging in with Google. Please try again.
login.errorPasskeyNotFound: This key is no longer valid or has been removed from this server.
login.termsText1: By continuing, you agree to our

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: At AulaCheck, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data.
privacy.dataCollectionDesc: We collect basic information such as your name and email through Google authentication to manage your access.
privacy.usageDesc: Your data is used exclusively to provide the AulaCheck service and improve the teaching experience.
privacy.dataDeletionDesc: You have the right to request the permanent deletion of your account and all associated data (courses, students, grades). This can be done directly from the Account section in the Dashboard. Upon doing so, all information will be permanently removed from our servers with no possibility of recovery.
privacy.contactDesc: If you have questions about this policy, contact us at support@aulacheck.com

security.title: Security & Access
security.description: Manage your access methods and linked devices.

passkeys.title: Biometrics / Passkeys
passkeys.description: Use your fingerprint, FaceID or PIN to sign in securely without passwords.
passkeys.noPasskeys: You don't have any linked devices yet.
passkeys.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this Passkey?

account.title: Account
account.description: Manage your account and permanently delete your information.
account.deleteWarning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.

deleteModal.title: Permanently delete account
deleteModal.description: You are about to permanently delete your account. This action is **irreversible** and will delete all your data, including:
deleteModal.success: Your account has been deleted. Redirecting...
deleteModal.error: An error occurred while trying to delete the account.

passkeyBanner.title: Faster access with Passkeys
passkeyBanner.description: You can activate access with your fingerprint or FaceID so you don't have to use Google every time.

dashboard.title: My Courses
dashboard.description: Manage your classes and students from here.

empty.title: You have no courses created
empty.description: Start by creating your first course to manage attendance and grades.

errors.fetch: Error loading courses. Please try reloading the page.

empty.title: No students registered
empty.description: Add some students or invite them to start managing attendance and grades.

invite.title: Invite Students
invite.howItWorksDesc: Share this link with your students. They can register from their phones and you will approve the requests.
invite.generateLinkDesc: Generate an invitation link so students can register on their own
invite.qrDesc: Students can scan this code with their phones. Remember link is valid for 2 hours.
invite.expiredDesc: The previous code is no longer valid. Generate a new one so your students can register.

disableConfirm.title: Disable link
disableConfirm.desc: Are you sure you want to disable the invitation link? Students will no longer be able to use this code and the QR will disappear.

alerts.successDisable: The invitation link has been successfully disabled.
alerts.errorDisable: An error occurred while trying to disable the link.

export.title: Export Data
export.automaticNotice: * Last Name and First Name are always included automatically.
export.attendanceDetailsDesc: Includes one column per class day with status (P/A/T)

list.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email or ID...

empty.search: No students found with that criteria

inactiveSection.title: Withdrawn students
inactiveSection.emptySearch: No withdrawn students found with that criteria

hardDeleteModal.title: Delete student permanently
hardDeleteModal.description: You are about to permanently delete {name} and all related records. This action cannot be undone or recovered.

addModal.title: Add Student
addModal.notesPlaceholder: Enter additional details, behavior, medical notes, etc.

addCommentModal.title: Add Comment
addCommentModal.commentPlaceholder: Enter a comment about the student...

withdrawModal.title: Withdraw student
withdrawModal.description: You are about to withdraw {name}. The student will not be deleted from the database to maintain historical records, but will no longer appear in attendance lists.
withdrawModal.label: Reason for withdrawal *

joinRequests.title: Join Requests
joinRequests.description: The following students have scanned the QR code and are waiting for your approval to join the course.
joinRequests.error: An error occurred while processing the request.

duplicateBox.title: Possible duplicate detected: {count} similar name matches

sheet.noRecords: No attendance records for this course.
sheet.howToStart: Start taking attendance to see the sheet.
sheet.helpDesktop: Right click on an icon to edit.

modal.title: Take Attendance
modal.deleteDateConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this date and all its records?
modal.duplicateDesc: Attendance for this date has already been taken and cannot be modified from this screen.
modal.allMarkedDesc: You have recorded attendance for all students for this date.

suspendedMessage.title: Class suspended
suspendedMessage.desc: No need to take attendance for this date.

alerts.selectStudent: You must select a student to grade.
alerts.error: There was a problem saving the grade.

behavior.title: Behavioral Score
behavior.description: Adjustment of behavior points for the term

phoneInput.label: Phone / WhatsApp (Optional)
phoneInput.helpText: Enter area code and number (without 0 or 15)

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.introDesc: By accessing and using AulaCheck, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms and Conditions of Use, all applicable laws and regulations.
terms.usageDesc: Permission to use, copy, modify, and/or distribute this software for any purpose with or without fee is hereby granted under the ISC license, provided that the above copyright notice and this permission notice appear in all copies.
terms.disclaimerDesc: The software is provided 'as is', without warranty of any kind, express or implied. AulaCheck does not warrant the accuracy or reliability of the use of the materials in its application.
terms.limitationsDesc: In no event shall AulaCheck or its suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use AulaCheck.
terms.dataDesc: AulaCheck is committed to protecting the privacy of student and teacher data. Data is stored securely and is not shared with third parties for commercial purposes.
terms.conductDesc: You agree not to use the application for any purpose that is unlawful or prohibited by these terms. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your access credentials.
terms.accountDeletionDesc: The user may opt to permanently delete their account at any time. This action is irreversible and entails the definitive loss of all associated data (courses, students, records).
